name: Rusty Sword
lore: A worn blade, barely sharp enough to cut bread.
ability1_tooltip: A simple slash attack dealing weapon damage. Generates 1 combo point.
ability2_tooltip: A fast attack that deals reduced damage but has a short cooldown. Good for building combo points quickly.
passive1_desc: Deals 5% less damage due to dull blade

name: Chipped Axe
lore: A woodcutter's axe past its prime.
ability1_tooltip: A heavy chop dealing weapon damage. Has a chance to apply bleed.
ability2_tooltip: A forceful strike that applies bleed to the target.
passive1_desc: 5% chance attacks miss due to chipped edge

name: Blunt Dagger
lore: More of a butter knife than a weapon.
ability1_tooltip: A quick stab attack. Fast attack speed makes up for low damage.
ability2_tooltip: Deals bonus damage when attacking from behind.
passive1_desc: Critical hits deal 10% less bonus damage

name: Worn Hammer
lore: An old blacksmith's hammer repurposed for combat.
ability1_tooltip: A heavy bash that deals damage and has a chance to stun.
ability2_tooltip: Slam the ground dealing AoE damage and slowing enemies.

name: Simple Bow
lore: A hunting bow made from bent wood and twine.
ability1_tooltip: Fire an arrow at the target dealing weapon damage.
ability2_tooltip: Take careful aim for increased damage and crit chance.

name: Makeshift Crossbow
lore: A crude crossbow held together with rope and hope.
ability1_tooltip: Fire a crossbow bolt at the target.
ability2_tooltip: A powerful shot that pierces through enemies.

name: Old Flintlock
lore: An antique firearm that still goes bang... sometimes.
ability1_tooltip: Fire a single shot. Long reload time but high damage.
ability2_tooltip: Fire an explosive shot that damages nearby enemies.

name: Apprentice Staff
lore: A novice mage's first channeling focus.
ability1_tooltip: Fire a bolt of arcane energy at the target.
ability2_tooltip: Releases stored mana as a damaging burst.

name: Tattered Tome
lore: Pages are missing but some spells remain legible.
ability1_tooltip: Creates a small shield absorbing incoming damage.
ability2_tooltip: Converts health into mana.

name: Heavy Iron Blade
lore: Unwieldy but packs a punch.
ability1_tooltip: A slow but powerful slash in a wide arc.
ability2_tooltip: Bring the blade down with tremendous force.

name: Lumber Axe
lore: Better suited for trees than enemies.
ability1_tooltip: A devastating swing meant for felling trees.
ability2_tooltip: Swing in a wide arc hitting all enemies in front.
ability2_effect: Hits all enemies in a 180° arc

name: Mining Sledge
lore: A miner's sledgehammer, heavy and brutal.
ability1_tooltip: A crushing blow that ignores some armor.
ability2_tooltip: Slam the ground creating a shockwave.
ability2_effect: Slows all enemies hit by 30% for 3s

name: Bloodfeud Blade
lore: Forged in endless clan blood feuds, this blade thirsts for vengeance.
ability1_tooltip: A fierce slash that builds Grudge Mark stacks on the target. Each stack increases your damage against them by 5%. Maximum 3 stacks.
ability1_effect: Applies Grudge Mark (5% damage amp per stack, max 3)
ability2_tooltip: Dash forward 8 meters, dealing damage to all enemies in your path. Generates 2 Grudge Marks on each enemy hit.
ability2_effect: Dash 8m, applies 2 Grudge Marks to each enemy hit
ability3_tooltip: Enter a defensive stance for 3 seconds, reducing incoming damage by 40% and reflecting 20% of blocked damage back to attackers.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Unleash a massive AoE slash that consumes all Grudge Marks on nearby enemies. Heals you for 5% of your max HP per enemy hit. Healing doubled for enemies with 3 Grudge Marks.
ability4_effect: Heals 5% max HP per enemy hit, 10% if 3 marks
passive1_desc: 5% of damage dealt is returned as health

name: Wraithfang
lore: Whispers forgotten grudges in the dark, striking from shadows.
ability1_tooltip: A swift slash that applies Grudge Marks. Critical hits apply 2 marks instead of 1.
ability2_tooltip: Dash through shadows 6m and emerge behind your target, stunning them for 1 second.
ability3_tooltip: A devastating strike that deals 50% bonus damage to targets below 30% health.
ability3_effect: Execute bonus vs low HP targets
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Teleport behind the target and unleash a flurry of strikes, applying a powerful bleed that deals 300% weapon damage over 6 seconds.
passive2_desc: Gain 10% attack speed when Grudge Marks are active
passive3_desc: Grudge Marks explode for 20% weapon damage when consumed

name: Gorehowl
lore: Howls with the gore of fallen foes, thirsting for blood in every swing.
ability1_tooltip: A brutal chop that applies Bleed stacks to the target. Each stack deals 5% weapon damage per second for 6 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks.
ability1_effect: Applies 1 Bleed stack (5% dmg/s for 6s, max 5)
ability2_tooltip: Channel your rage to increase attack speed by 30% for 5 seconds. Each hit extends duration by 0.5 seconds.
ability2_effect: +30% attack speed for 5s, extends on hit
ability3_tooltip: Spin rapidly for 3 seconds, dealing damage to all nearby enemies. Each enemy hit refreshes all Bleed stacks on them.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Unleash a devastating cleave that deals massive damage and knocks back all enemies. Enemies with 5 Bleed stacks take 100% bonus damage.
passive1_desc: Heal for 5% of damage dealt to bleeding targets

name: Wraithbone Bow
lore: Carved from bones of wraiths, its arrows seek the souls of the living.
ability1_tooltip: Fire an arrow that marks the target with Grudge. Marked targets take 10% increased damage from your abilities. Range: 30m.
ability2_tooltip: Fire a cone of 5 arrows in front of you, each dealing reduced damage. Excellent for hitting multiple targets.
ability3_tooltip: Channel for 3 seconds, firing rapid arrows that pierce through all enemies in a line. Each hit increases damage by 5%.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Fire 3 spectral arrows that home in on marked targets. Each arrow deals massive damage and passes through all enemies.

name: Nightfang
lore: Fang of endless night grudges, striking silently from the shadows.
ability1_tooltip: A quick stab that builds Shadow Marks. Attacks from behind apply 2 marks. Maximum 5 marks per target.
ability2_tooltip: Dash 8m through shadows, dealing damage to all enemies in your path. Grants 2 seconds of invisibility after.
ability3_tooltip: Strike with a poisoned blade dealing damage over 8 seconds. Poison stacks up to 3 times.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Execute a target with 5 Shadow Marks, dealing massive damage. Instantly kills targets below 15% HP.

name: Emberwrath Staff
lore: Wrath of endless burning grudges, channeling flames of vengeance.
ability1_tooltip: Launch a bolt of fire at the target, building Burn stacks. Each stack deals 3% magic damage per second. Maximum 5 stacks.
ability2_tooltip: Send a wave of fire in a cone, dealing damage and applying 2 Burn stacks to all enemies hit.
ability3_tooltip: Surround yourself with flames for 5 seconds. Absorb 30% of incoming damage and reflect 20% as fire damage.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Explode all Burn stacks on nearby enemies, dealing 50% bonus damage per stack consumed. Applies maximum stacks to all enemies hit.
passive3_desc: +8% critical hit chance on burning targets

name: Glacial Spire Staff
lore: Spire of glacial eternal grudges, freezing enemies in their tracks.
ability1_tooltip: Fire a bolt of ice, building Chill stacks. Each stack slows the target by 10%. At 5 stacks, target is frozen for 1.5 seconds.
ability1_effect: Applies 1 Chill stack (10% slow, freeze at 5)
ability2_tooltip: Release a nova of frost around you, dealing damage and slowing all enemies by 40% for 3 seconds.
ability3_tooltip: Create an ice barrier that absorbs damage equal to 40% of your max mana. Enemies that attack the shield are chilled.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Flash freeze all enemies in a large area for 3 seconds. Frozen enemies take 50% increased damage from all sources.

name: Ironveil Repeater
lore: Rapid fire from iron veils, delivering death with mechanical precision.
ability1_tooltip: Fire a heavy bolt that builds Penetration stacks. Each stack ignores 5% of target armor. Maximum 4 stacks.
ability2_tooltip: Fire a powerful bolt that knocks the target back 6m and stuns them for 0.5 seconds.
ability3_tooltip: Fire a bolt that deploys a trap on impact. Enemies stepping on the trap are rooted for 2 seconds.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Fire a bolt charged with energy that pierces through all enemies in a line, dealing massive damage to each.
ability4_effect: Pierces all enemies in line, 40m range

name: Blackpowder Blaster
lore: Blasts with ancient blackpowder grudges, explosive and devastating.
ability1_tooltip: Fire a shot that builds Powder Marks. Each mark increases explosion damage by 20%. Maximum 3 marks.
ability1_effect: Applies Powder Mark (+20% explosion dmg, max 3)
ability2_tooltip: Fire an explosive round that deals AoE damage on impact. Damage increased by 20% per Powder Mark.
ability3_tooltip: Fire a smoke grenade that blinds all enemies in the area for 3 seconds. Blinded enemies have 50% reduced accuracy.
ability4_tooltip: ULTIMATE: Unleash a devastating blast that consumes all Powder Marks, dealing massive damage and knocking back all enemies.
